# URL / slug test inventory (movemental-ai + movemental-dashboard)

Generated from App Router `page.tsx` files (route groups like `(site)` / `(dashboard)` / `(public)` are omitted from URLs). Dynamic segments appear as `:paramName` matching the folder name (e.g. `[slug]` → `:slug`).

Replace **`{{MOVEMENTAL_AI_ORIGIN}}`** and **`{{MOVEMENTAL_DASHBOARD_ORIGIN}}`** with your base URL (for example `http://localhost:3000`, preview URL, or production origin).

---

## movemental-ai

Repo: `movemental-ai` · App directory: `src/app/`

### Full URLs to test (prefix + path)

Append each path to `{{MOVEMENTAL_AI_ORIGIN}}` (home is `/` only).

```
{{MOVEMENTAL_AI_ORIGIN}}/
{{MOVEMENTAL_AI_ORIGIN}}/about
{{MOVEMENTAL_AI_ORIGIN}}/admin/onboarding
```

**Concrete program template examples** (swap in any valid `templateId` from `src/lib/program/data/stitch-templates.json`; there are 19 `safety` and 26 `sandbox` templates as of manifest `generated` in that file):

```
{{MOVEMENTAL_AI_ORIGIN}}/program/safety/ai_organizational_policy_detailed_view
{{MOVEMENTAL_AI_ORIGIN}}/program/sandbox/cohort_view_sandboxlive_dashboard
```

### movemental-ai — redirect sources worth spot-checking

These paths are **not** separate `page.tsx` routes; they are configured in `next.config.ts` and should return **301** to the destination. Useful for link rot and SEO checks.

```
/blog
/book
/book/anything
/content/articles/sandbox
/content/articles/sandbox/deep/path
/downloads/it-starts-with-safety-v1.pdf
/downloads/movemental-sandbox-field-guide-it-continues-with-exploration.pdf
/fragmentation
/fragmentation/old
/fragmentation-old
/fragmentation-intel
/how-it-works
/how-it-works/step
/inquiry
/apply
/assessment-new
/case-studies
/churches-new
/institutions-new
/knowledge-ecosystem
/manifesto
/movemental-at-100
/movement-leaders-new
/nonprofits-new
/nonprofits-new/next
/nonprofits-system-example-new
/organizations
/organizations/foo/bar
/services/discovery-lab
/services/organizational-systems
/services/system-builds
/skills
/system-builds
/system-builds/foo
/team
/team/legacy
/toolkit/safety-toolkit.pdf
/vision
/who-its-for
/pathway/foundations
/pathway/foundations/sub
/pathway/lab
/pathway/lab/sub
/pathway/fluency
/pathway/fluency/sub
/pathway/build
/pathway/build/sub
```

## Scope notes

- **Pages only**: This inventory lists **document routes** (`page.tsx`). Neither app’s full set of **`/api/*` route handlers** is enumerated here (hundreds of endpoints in each repo). Add API smoke tests separately if needed.
- **Regenerate**: Re-run a filesystem scan over `src/app/**/page.tsx` after adding routes; route groups `(…)` must continue to be stripped when deriving public paths.
